appraisal_events.evidence: « Mais voyons, vous me prenez pour un crétin du Valais, pour un demeuré. »
appraisal_events.explanation: By sharply rejecting the implication that he might not follow, Robert asserts his quickness and takes control of the exchange; the narrator simply reports this retort.

status_effects.explanation: Robert gains local conversational leverage by rebuking the repeated questioning and positioning himself as not to be treated like a fool.
